message:
fix(report,profile_sweep): resolve artifact paths relative to run dir and decouple usage output

report.rs: introduce resolve_existing_artifact_path to resolve relative
artifact paths against run_dir before falling back to cwd; use output
HTML parent as link_base so cross-directory reports produce correct
relative hrefs. Adds three tests covering the new resolution logic.

profile_sweep.rs: split usage_and_exit into print_usage_to (writer-based)
and usage_error_and_exit; --help now prints to stdout and exits 0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
